SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

high.mackenzie.snowflake
Interface IGrammarBuilder

All Known Implementing Classes:
GrammarBuilder
public interface IGrammarBuilder

An instance of this interface constructs a new Parsing Expression Grammar.

The namespace for rules is distinct from that of character-classes.

An end-rule is always available via the name "END".

Method Summary
 IGrammarBuilder and(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds an and-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder choose(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... options)
          This method adds an ordered choice-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder chr(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String character)
          This method adds a character-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder combine(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... elements)
          This method adds a combination character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder exclude(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String include, java.lang.String exclude)
          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder negate(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String negates)
          This method adds a negation character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder not(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a not-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder option(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "Zero or One" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder plus(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "One or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder range(java.lang.String name, char character)
          This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder range(java.lang.String name, char minimum, char maximum)
          This method adds a range character-class to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder repeat(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item, int minimum, int maximum)
          This method adds a new repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder sequence(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... elements)
          This method adds a new sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder sequenceDLR(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String base, java.lang.String... shared)
          This method adds a directly-left-recursive sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder setRoot(java.lang.String name)
          This method specifies the name of the root rule in the grammar.
 IGrammarBuilder setTraceCount(int count)
          This method specifies the number of match starts/successes/failures to record.
 IGrammarBuilder star(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String item)
          This method adds a "Zero or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 IGrammarBuilder str(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String string)
          This method adds a string-rule to the grammar that is being built.
 

Method Detail

and

IGrammarBuilder and(java.lang.String name,
                    java.lang.String item)
This method adds an and-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - the the rule that the new rule will attempt to match.
Returns:
this.

not

IGrammarBuilder not(java.lang.String name,
                    java.lang.String item)
This method adds a not-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - is the rule that the new rule will attempt to match.
Returns:
this.

sequence

IGrammarBuilder sequence(java.lang.String name,
                         java.lang.String... elements)
This method adds a new sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
elements - are the names of the rules in the sequence.
Returns:
this.

sequenceDLR

IGrammarBuilder sequenceDLR(java.lang.String name,
                            java.lang.String base,
                            java.lang.String... shared)
This method adds a directly-left-recursive sequence-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
base - is the base-case of the recursive sequence.
shared - is the subsequence that is shared by all matches of the recursive sequence.
Returns:
this.

choose

IGrammarBuilder choose(java.lang.String name,
                       java.lang.String... options)
This method adds an ordered choice-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
options - are the names of the rules that are the options.
Returns:
this.

repeat

IGrammarBuilder repeat(java.lang.String name,
                       java.lang.String item,
                       int minimum,
                       int maximum)
This method adds a new repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - is the name of the rule that will be repeated.
minimum - is the minimum number of times that the item must match.
maximum - is the maximum number of times that the item will be matched.
Returns:
this.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minimum > maximum.

star

IGrammarBuilder star(java.lang.String name,
                     java.lang.String item)
This method adds a "Zero or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Equivalence: repeat(name, item, 0, Integer.MAX_VALUE)

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - is the name of the rule that may be repeated.
Returns:
this.

plus

IGrammarBuilder plus(java.lang.String name,
                     java.lang.String item)
This method adds a "One or More" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Equivalence: repeat(name, item, 1, Integer.MAX_VALUE)

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - is the name of the rule that may be repeated.
Returns:
this.

option

IGrammarBuilder option(java.lang.String name,
                       java.lang.String item)
This method adds a "Zero or One" repetition-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Equivalence: repeat(name, item, 0, 1)

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
item - is the name of the rule that is optional.
Returns:
this.

str

IGrammarBuilder str(java.lang.String name,
                    java.lang.String string)
This method adds a string-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
string - is the text that the string-rule will match.
Returns:
this.

chr

IGrammarBuilder chr(java.lang.String name,
                    java.lang.String character)
This method adds a character-rule to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new rule.
character - is the name of a character-class.
Returns:
this.

range

IGrammarBuilder range(java.lang.String name,
                      char character)
This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new character-class.
character - is the character that the new character-class will match.
Returns:
this.

range

IGrammarBuilder range(java.lang.String name,
                      char minimum,
                      char maximum)
This method adds a range character-class to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new character-class.
minimum - is the minimum character in the inclusive range of characters.
maximum - is the maximum character in the inclusive range of characters.
Returns:
this.

combine

IGrammarBuilder combine(java.lang.String name,
                        java.lang.String... elements)
This method adds a combination character-class to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new character-class.
elements - are the character-classes that will be combined.
Returns:
this.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if any of the elements do not exist.

exclude

IGrammarBuilder exclude(java.lang.String name,
                        java.lang.String include,
                        java.lang.String exclude)
This method adds a single-char character-class to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new character-class.
include - is the name of the character-class that is a superset of the new class.
exclude - is the name of the character-class that is the complement of the new class.
Returns:
this.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either argument character-class does not already exist.

negate

IGrammarBuilder negate(java.lang.String name,
                       java.lang.String negates)
This method adds a negation character-class to the grammar that is being built.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the new character-class.
negates - is the name of a character-class to negate.
Returns:
this.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the character-class to negate does not exist.

setRoot

IGrammarBuilder setRoot(java.lang.String name)
This method specifies the name of the root rule in the grammar.

Parameters:
name - is the name of the root rule.
Returns:
this.

setTraceCount

IGrammarBuilder setTraceCount(int count)
This method specifies the number of match starts/successes/failures to record.

Higher counts may make debugging grammars easier, but more memory will be used.

If this method is not invoked, then a default value of (1024) will be used.

Parameters:
count - is the new maximum size of the backtrace.
Returns:
this.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the new maximum size is less than zero.
